scripts.title: You're About to Board the Titanic
scripts.concept: POV: Walking through Titanic's grand staircase like you're actually there

shots.visual: Black screen with elegant gold text appearing, then dramatic reveal of the recreated Titanic grand staircase with ornate carved wood, crystal chandelier, red carpet, period lighting
shots.text_overlay: POV: You just walked onto the Titanic
shots.camera: Slow push forward through darkness into light

shots.visual: Close-up of authentic Titanic artifacts under museum lighting: personal belongings, ship pieces, china, jewelry, letters in display cases
Wide shot of families and visitors with expressions of complete awe, children pointing excitedly, adults covering their mouths in amazement
Quick montage: exhibition entrance with crowds, ticket booth, people taking selfies, then logo reveal

music.build: Starts mysterious, builds to emotional peak, ends urgent
music.reference_track: Similar to movie trailer music - Hans Zimmer style

scripts.caption: 300+ authentic artifacts. Full-scale ship recreations. The story told like never before. Titanic: The Exhibition. Over 3M visitors worldwide. Book now before tickets sell out. #TitanicExhibition #ImmersiveExperience #MustSee

scripts.title: The Ship Everyone's Talking About
scripts.concept: FOMO-driven tour through the most Instagram-worthy historical experience

shots.visual: Person's hand reaching for ornate door handle, then cut to their face as door opens revealing the grand staircase recreation
shots.audio: Trending TikTok audio with dramatic build

shots.visual: Recreated first-class dining room with period table settings, elegant lighting, visitors in period costumes posing
Wall of authentic artifacts: passenger belongings, ship blueprints, rescue items, each dramatically lit
Recreation of ship's hull exterior at night with stars, visitors walking along deck recreation
Interactive timeline showing ship's final hours, visitors touching screens, learning about passengers
Montage of real visitor reactions: kids gasping, adults tearing up, families taking photos, couples holding hands in awe
Exterior shot of exhibition building with crowds entering, ticket booth busy, social media posts showing on screens
AUROS branding with exhibition logo, website URL, and location details over dramatic Titanic imagery

music.build: Mysterious opening, emotional middle, urgent finale
music.reference_track: Similar to Interstellar soundtrack meets social media trending audio

scripts.caption: Walk the Grand Staircase. Touch real artifacts recovered from 12,500 feet below. Hear the stories of real passengers. Rated 4.8/5 by visitors. Over 3 million people have experienced this worldwide. Don't miss your chance. #TitanicExhibition #History #BookNow
scripts.cta: Check dates and availability → Link in bio

scripts.title: Some Stories Never Die
scripts.concept: Movie trailer revealing history's greatest tragedy as an unmissable experience

shots.visual: Complete black screen with elegant typography: 'April 14, 1912' appears, then fades. Slow reveal of dark ocean surface with moonlight
Underwater shot rising toward surface, then cut to recreation of Titanic's grand staircase in warm, golden lighting with period details
shots.text_overlay: The most famous ship ever built
shots.camera: Slow ascent then smooth dolly through staircase

shots.visual: Close-ups of authentic artifacts: passenger letters, jewelry, ship components, china pieces, all under dramatic museum lighting
shots.camera: Intimate macro shots with shallow focus

shots.visual: Wide shot of first-class cabin recreation with period furniture, then visitors in period costumes experiencing the luxury
shots.audio: Music swells with period orchestra feel

shots.visual: Dramatic recreation of ship's exterior at night, visitors walking the deck, looking up at stars, feeling the scale
shots.audio: Ocean sounds mixed with orchestral peak
shots.camera: Epic wide shots and intimate reactions

shots.visual: Rapid montage of visitor reactions: children's eyes widening, adults reading passenger stories, families experiencing together, tears of recognition
Interactive timeline showing ship's final hours, rescue operations, survivor accounts, visitors engaging deeply with history
shots.text_overlay: Their courage. Their sacrifice. Their legacy.

shots.visual: Exterior establishing shot of exhibition building with crowds, then cut to families exiting with changed expressions, still processing
shots.camera: Drone shot to intimate family moments

shots.visual: Final logo reveal over ocean imagery, exhibition details, booking information with AUROS branding
shots.text_overlay:
TITANIC: THE EXHIBITION
Now open. Limited engagement.

music.style: Full orchestral score with period instruments
music.build: Somber opening, builds through wonder, peaks at emotion, resolves with hope
music.reference_track: Similar to James Horner's Titanic score meets modern trailer music

scripts.caption:
Some stories are too important to forget.

For the first time, experience the Titanic through the eyes of those who lived it. Walk her decks. Touch her artifacts. Feel her legacy.

Over 300 authentic pieces from the ship and her passengers. Full-scale recreations that transport you to 1912. Stories of courage, love, and human spirit that will stay with you forever.

This isn't just history. This is humanity.

🚢 TITANIC: THE EXHIBITION
📍 [Location]
🎫 Now open - Limited engagement
⏰ Book now: [website]

Some experiences change how you see the world. This is one of them.

#TitanicExhibition #NeverForget #HistoryAlive #LimitedTime #BookNow #Experience #Legacy
scripts.cta: Experience history. Book your tickets now.
